hindi: बाल समय रवि भक्ष लियो तब, तीनहुं लोक भयो अंधियारो।
english: In childhood he swallowed the sun, plunging all three worlds into darkness
roman: Baal samay ravi bhaksha liyo tab, teenahun lok bhayo andhiyaaro

hindi: ताहि सों त्रास भयो जग को, यह संकट काहु सों जात न टारो।
english: The world trembled with fear and this crisis could not be resolved by anyone
roman: Tahi son tras bhayo jag ko, yah sankat kahu son jat na taaro

hindi: देवन आनि करी बिनती तब, छाड़ी दियो रवि कष्ट निवारो।
english: The gods came and pleaded, he released the sun, removing the calamity
roman: Devan aani kari binti tab, chadi diyo ravi kasht nivaaro

hindi: को नहीं जानत है जग में कपि, संकटमोचन नाम तिहारो।
english: Who in the world does not know, O monkey, your name Sankat Mochan
roman: Ko nahin janat hai jag mein kapi, sankatmochan naam tiharo

hindi: बालि की त्रास कपीस बसैं गिरि, जात महाप्रभु पंथ निहारो।
english: Tormented by Bali the monkey-king lived on the mountain watching the path
roman: Baali ki tras kapees basain giri, jaat mahaprabhu panth nihaaro

hindi: चौंकि महामुनि साप दियो तब, चाहिए कौन बिचार बिचारो।
english: The great sage gave a curse — what more consideration was needed
roman: Chonki mahamuni saap diyo tab, chahiye kaun bichaar bichaaro

hindi: कैद्विज रूप लिवाय महाप्रभु, सो तुम दास के सोक निवारो।
english: Bringing the great Lord in brahmin form, you removed the servant's grief
roman: Kaidwij roop livaay mahaprabhu, so tum daas ke sog nivaaro

hindi: को नहीं जानत है जग में कपि, संकटमोचन नाम तिहारो।
english: Who in the world does not know, O monkey, your name Sankat Mochan
roman: Ko nahin janat hai jag mein kapi, sankatmochan naam tiharo

hindi: लाल देह लाली लसे, अरु धरि लाल लंगूर।
english: His red body glows brilliantly, bearing his red tail
roman: Laal deh laali lase, aru dhari laal langoor

hindi: वज्र देह दानव दलन, जय जय जय कपि सूर।।
english: His thunderbolt body destroys demons — victory to the heroic monkey
roman: Vajra deh danav dalan, jaya jaya jaya kapi soor
